title: etcd server vars
description: etcd vars that can be set

LIBSCRIPT_GLOBAL_INSTALL_METHOD.description: Global override for how software should be installed across all systems (e.g. system package manager vs downloaded binaries/from-source).

LIBSCRIPT_WINDOWS_PKG_MGR.description: Global package manager override for Windows targets (e.g. winget, choco).

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

ETCD_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for ETCD to listen on

ETCD_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for ETCD to listen on

ETCD_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for ETCD to listen on

ETCD_SERVICE_RUN_AS_USER.description: Windows local user account to run the service (leave empty for Network Service)

ETCD_SERVICE_RUN_AS_PASSWORD.description: Password for the local user account (if applicable)

ETCD_SERVICE_NAME.description: Custom name for the Windows Service (allows side-by-side installations)
